feature: GarudaX Bot — Full Conversational Agent Replacing All Admin UI Actions
requirement: Create an agent bot that replaces ALL human actions (searching, tapping menus, clicking buttons) through natural language conversation. Users with no deep system knowledge should operate the entire exchange via the bot. The bot acts as a system user linked to the logged-in admin/operator.

tasks.title: Executor — complete action handlers for all 63 gateway routes
tasks.description:
The executor currently handles 14 action categories but the gateway has 63 routes. Add handlers for ALL uncovered routes so every admin UI action is executable via bot conversation.

Update `src/gateway/internal/bot/executor.go`:

1. **Orders** (6 routes):
   - 'submit buy 10 wheat at 325' / 'place order buy 5 corn at 450' → POST /api/v1/orders
     Parse: side (buy/sell), quantity, instrument alias, price
   - 'show orders' / 'my orders' / 'list orders' → GET /api/v1/orders
   - 'show order ABC' → GET /api/v1/orders/ABC
   - 'cancel order ABC' → DELETE /api/v1/orders/ABC
   - 'cancel all orders' → DELETE /api/v1/orders
   - 'modify order ABC price 330 qty 20' → PATCH /api/v1/orders/ABC

2. **Admin actions** (3 new):
   - 'bust trade ABC' / 'bust trade ABC reason fat finger' → POST /admin/trades/ABC/bust
   - 'disable participant ABC' → POST /admin/participants/ABC/disable
   - 'set circuit breaker wheat upper 15 lower 10' → PUT /admin/instruments/.../circuit-breaker

3. **Compliance** (5 new):
   - 'suspend trader ABC for insider trading' → POST /compliance/participants/ABC/suspend
   - 'reinstate trader ABC' → POST /compliance/participants/ABC/reinstate
   - 'file SAR on trader ABC for money laundering' → POST /compliance/sar
   - 'screen participant ABC' → POST /screening/check
   - 'resolve alert 123' → POST /compliance/alerts/123/resolve

4. **Market data** (3 new):
   - 'wheat candles' / 'show candles for wheat' → GET /market-data/candles/WHT-...
   - 'corn trades' / 'recent trades corn' → GET /market-data/trades/CRN-...
   - 'last trade wheat' → GET /instruments/WHT-.../trades/latest

5. **Clearing** (2 new):
   - 'show netting' / 'netting results' → GET /clearing/netting
   - 'show position for wheat' → GET /clearing/positions/WHT-...

6. **Warehouse** (3 new):
   - 'show deliveries' → GET /warehouse/deliveries (via inventory context)
   - 'show receipts' → within inventory handler
   - 'pledge receipt ABC' → POST /warehouse/receipts/ABC/pledge

7. **Risk** (1 new):
   - 'set wheat max order 500' / 'update risk limit wheat qty 500 value 5000000' → PUT /admin/risk/order-limits/WHT-...

8. **Reports** (2 new):
   - 'market summary' / 'market summary today' → GET /admin/reports/market-summary?date=today
   - 'large trader report' / 'large traders' → GET /admin/reports/large-traders?date=today

9. **Audit**:
   - 'show audit log' / 'audit trail' → GET /compliance/audit-trail

10. **Netting**:
    - 'show netting' → GET /clearing/netting

11. **Profile** (2 new):
    - 'my profile' / 'who am I' → GET /auth/me
    - 'change password' → guidance for password change

Also improve the help command to list ALL available actions grouped by category.

Acceptance: Every one of the 63 gateway routes has a natural language trigger. Test with 'help' showing all commands.

tasks.title: Intent parser with instrument/participant resolution
tasks.description:
Create a smart intent parser in the executor that handles natural language variations, entity extraction, and context.

Create `src/gateway/internal/bot/parser.go`:

1. ParseIntent(message string) → Intent struct:
   ```go
   type Intent struct {
       Action     string            // halt, resume, approve, etc.
       Entity     string            // instrument ID, participant ID, etc.
       Params     map[string]string // reason, price, qty, etc.
       Raw        string            // original message
   }
   ```

2. Instrument resolver — resolveInstrument(name) already exists, enhance:
   - Support partial matches: 'whe' → wheat, 'cas' → cashmere
   - Support 'first instrument' / 'the wheat one'
   - Case insensitive

3. Participant resolver:
   - Extract participant IDs from patterns: 'trader ABC', 'participant 123', 'user XYZ'
   - Support email patterns: 'trader1@garudax.mn'

4. Order parser:
   - 'buy 10 wheat at 325' → {side:BUY, qty:10, instrument:WHT-..., price:325}
   - 'sell 5 corn at 450' → {side:SELL, qty:5, instrument:CRN-..., price:450}
   - 'market buy 20 wheat' → {side:BUY, qty:20, instrument:WHT-..., type:MARKET}

5. Number extractor:
   - '15%' → 15.0
   - 'qty 500' → 500
   - 'price 325.50' → 325.50

6. Date resolver:
   - 'today' → current date
   - 'yesterday' → current date - 1
   - '2026-03-31' → as-is

Acceptance: Parser handles 50+ natural language variations correctly.

tasks.title: Bot gateway — forward user JWT for audited action execution
tasks.description:
Ensure the bot executes all actions using the logged-in user's JWT token so every action is audited under the real user's identity.

Update `src/gateway/internal/bot/handler.go`:
1. Extract Bearer token from Authorization header
2. Pass to executor.Execute(message, userToken)
3. All executor API calls include this token
4. Response includes action attribution: 'Executed by admin@garudax.mn'

Update `src/gateway/internal/bot/executor.go`:
1. Ensure EVERY doRequest call includes the user token
2. For write operations (halt, approve, bust, etc.), include attribution in response
3. Log all bot-executed actions with user ID for audit trail

Acceptance: Bot actions appear in audit trail under the logged-in user's identity.

tasks.title: Chat UI — rich response cards + navigation actions
tasks.description:
Enhance the bot chat panel to render rich responses with clickable navigation.

Update `src/admin-ui/src/components/BotChatPanel.tsx`:
1. Parse bot reply for formatting:
   - Lines starting with ✅ → green success style
   - Lines starting with ❌ → red error style
   - Lines starting with • or - → bullet list
   - **bold** text → <strong>
   - Lines with : → key-value pair rendering
2. Action buttons:
   - Actions with type 'link' render as clickable buttons
   - onClick navigates to the target page using react-router
   - Styled as pill buttons below the message
3. Auto-scroll to latest message
4. Show timestamp on each message

Update `src/admin-ui/src/services/botApi.ts`:
1. Normalize action objects: map {url} → {target} for navigation

Create `src/admin-ui/src/components/BotMessageCard.tsx` + CSS:
1. Renders formatted bot messages with success/error/list styling
2. Renders action buttons
3. Pure function: parseMessageForDisplay(reply) → formatted segments

Acceptance: Bot responses render with formatting. Action buttons navigate to correct pages.

tasks.title: Go tests — executor unit tests for ALL 63 action paths
tasks.description:
Write comprehensive Go tests verifying every action handler in the executor.

Create `src/gateway/internal/bot/executor_test.go`:

Use httptest.NewServer to mock gateway. For each action category:
- Set up mock response
- Call executor.Execute(message, token)
- Assert correct endpoint called
- Assert response contains expected text

Target: 80+ tests covering:
- Trading: halt/resume (6 instruments × 2), mass cancel, bust trade, circuit breaker (15 tests)
- Orders: submit buy/sell, list, get, cancel, modify (12 tests)
- KYC: approve, reject with reason, suspend, reinstate, disable, list, screen (10 tests)
- Margin: calls, stats, calculate, portfolio (8 tests)
- Settlement: trigger, list cycles (5 tests)
- Compliance: alerts, resolve, SAR, surveillance, audit trail (8 tests)
- Market data: ticker, book, candles, trades per instrument (8 tests)
- Warehouse: inventory, receipts, deliveries, pledge (5 tests)
- Risk: list limits, update limits (4 tests)
- Reports: market summary, large traders with dates (4 tests)
- System: health, help, unknown message, empty (5 tests)
- Instrument resolution: all 6 aliases + full ID + unknown (8 tests)

Acceptance: 80+ tests pass. Every executor path tested.

tasks.title: Go tests — parser unit tests for natural language variations
tasks.description:
Write tests for the intent parser covering natural language variations.

Create `src/gateway/internal/bot/parser_test.go`:

- Instrument resolution: wheat, corn, soybeans, barley, cashmere, cattle, abbreviations, partial matches, full IDs, unknown (15 tests)
- Order parsing: 'buy 10 wheat at 325', 'sell 5 corn 450', 'market buy 20 wheat', edge cases (10 tests)
- Participant extraction: 'trader ABC', 'participant 123', 'user XYZ', email patterns (8 tests)
- Number extraction: '15%', 'qty 500', 'price 325.50', edge cases (6 tests)
- Date resolution: 'today', 'yesterday', ISO dates, invalid (5 tests)

Acceptance: 44+ tests pass.

tasks.title: Admin-UI tests — chat panel rendering + action navigation
tasks.description:
Write admin-ui tests for bot chat rendering and interaction.

Create `src/admin-ui/src/__tests__/bot-rendering.test.ts`:

- Message formatting: ✅/❌ prefix detection, bullet lists, bold text, key-value pairs (12 tests)
- Action button rendering: link type → clickable, correct target URL (6 tests)
- Suggestion normalization: {text,category} → {id,label,prompt} (5 tests)
- Response unwrapping: {data:{reply}} → {reply} (4 tests)
- BotContext state: message accumulation, typing indicator, panel toggle (8 tests)
- Ticket form: auto-category, metadata capture, validation (6 tests)
- Error handling: API errors, empty responses, malformed JSON (5 tests)

Acceptance: 46+ tests pass. All existing 303 admin-ui tests still pass.

tasks.title: E2E conversation test — 10 complete admin workflows via bot
tasks.description:
Write end-to-end tests simulating complete admin workflows executed entirely through bot conversation.

Create `src/gateway/internal/bot/workflows_test.go`:

Use httptest.NewServer. Each test simulates a multi-step admin workflow:

1. **Halt & Resume workflow**: 'halt wheat' → verify halted → 'resume wheat' → verify resumed
2. **KYC approval workflow**: 'show pending KYC' → 'approve trader ABC' → verify approved
3. **KYC rejection workflow**: 'reject trader XYZ because incomplete docs' → verify rejected with reason
4. **Margin investigation**: 'show margin calls' → 'recalculate margin' → verify calculated
5. **Settlement workflow**: 'show settlement cycles' → 'run settlement' → verify triggered
6. **Alert resolution**: 'show alerts' → 'resolve alert 123' → verify resolved
7. **Order lifecycle**: 'submit buy 10 wheat at 325' → 'show orders' → 'cancel order ABC'
8. **Risk management**: 'show risk limits' → 'set wheat max order 500' → verify updated
9. **Report generation**: 'market summary today' → verify report returned
10. **Ticket lifecycle**: 'report a bug login page slow' → 'show tickets' → verify created

Each workflow tests the full chain: natural language → executor → API call → formatted response.

Acceptance: All 10 workflow tests pass.

tasks.title: Docker rebuild + gateway deployment with full bot agent
tasks.description:
Rebuild and deploy the gateway with the complete bot agent.

1. Verify gateway builds: `cd src/gateway && go build ./...`
2. Run all gateway tests: `go test ./...`
3. Rebuild Docker: `docker compose build gateway`
4. Deploy: `docker compose up -d gateway`
5. Re-register admin user (in-memory auth)
6. Verify bot works: test 5 different action types via curl
7. Commit all changes

Acceptance: Bot responds correctly to halt, approve, health, margin, help commands via live gateway.
